mapper.select: select restoreid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, custid, cust_nm, birth_dt, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirestore a where 1=1 order by restoreid desc

select /*+ leading(b c a) use_hash(a) use_hash(c)*/ count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a, cotdl.tbl_piiorder b, cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep c where 1 =1 and a.orderid=b.orderid and a.archive_date is not null and a.delete_date is not null and b.status = 'Ended OK' and c.orderid=b.orderid and c.steptype = 'EXE_ARCHIVE'
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piirestore (restoreid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, basedate, custid, cust_nm, birth_dt, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{restoreid}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_orderid}, #{new_orderid}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rsdnt_altrntv_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_pin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select COALESCE(max(restoreid),10000)+1 from cotdl.tbl_piirestore
insert into cotdl.tbl_piirestore (restoreid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, basedate, custid, cust_nm, birth_dt, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{restoreid}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_orderid}, #{new_orderid}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rsdnt_altrntv_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_pin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set phase= 'APPROVING', status= 'APPLY', upddate= SYSDATE where restoreid= #{restoreid}
update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set phase= 'REJECTED', status= 'REJECTED', upddate= SYSDATE where restoreid= #{id}
update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set phase= 'APPROVED', status= 'ORDERED', upddate= SYSDATE where restoreid= #{id}
update cotdl.tbl_piiextract set exclude_reason= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, restore_date= SYSDATE where orderid= #{orderid} and custid= #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select restoreid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, to_char(basedate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as basedate, custid, cust_nm, birth_dt, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirestore where restoreid= #{restoreid}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set new_orderid= #{new_orderid}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= SYSDATE, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where restoreid= #{restoreid}
update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set status= (select status from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where orderid= #{new_orderid}) where new_orderid= #{new_orderid}
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piirestore a where 1=1
